title: bauhinia aherniana var. subglabra
intro: Bauhinia aherniana var. subglabra is a plant species, also known as the Philippine orchid tree, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Bauhinia aherniana var. subglabra has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve the use of its leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
